notesStmt.note: This file is part of the Swiss German Dialect Corpus ("Schweizerdeutsches Mundartkorpus") and a subcorpus containing copyright-free texts.

sourceDesc.bibl: Mähly, Jacob. 1856. Rhigmurmel: Gedichte in Basler Mundart. Basel: Schweighauser'sche Sortiments-Buchhandlung. https://www.e-helvetica.nb.admin.ch/search?urn=nbdig-14548 (zugegriffen: 10. Februar 2019).
